name: Radicchio, Fennel and Arugula Salad with Gorg
recipeIngredient: 6 cups washed and well spun dry Arugula
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, whisk together balsamic vinegar, Dijon mustard, salt, and pepper.
2. Slowly add olive oil to the mixture while continuously whisking until the dressing is emulsified.
3. In a large bowl, toss radicchio, fennel, walnuts, Gorganzola, and dressing.
4. Divide arugula among 8 plates.
5. Place the radicchio mixture on top of the arugula.
6. Serve immediately. Makes 8 servings.
Source: Cookbook USA
